Provides pre-computed Heat Index (Rothfusz 1990) rasters for the
Brazilian Semiarid region (1,477 municipalities, Res. CONDEL/SUDENE
176/2024) at four synoptic hours (00h, 09h, 15h, 21h local time) and
tools for spatial extraction by municipality name, IBGE code, or
user-supplied shapefile. Data are hosted on Zenodo
(doi:10.5281/zenodo.20942619) and downloaded on first use to a local
cache. Interpolated using External Drift Kriging with altitude and
ERA5-Land covariates. Future versions will include monthly, daily, and
hourly products.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`hi_available()`](https://antcneto.github.io/heatindexbr/reference/hi_available.md)
  : List available Heat Index products
- [`hi_download()`](https://antcneto.github.io/heatindexbr/reference/hi_download.md)
  : Download Heat Index rasters for the Brazilian Semiarid
- [`hi_municipality()`](https://antcneto.github.io/heatindexbr/reference/hi_municipality.md)
  : Extract Heat Index for municipalities of the Brazilian Semiarid
- [`hi_plot()`](https://antcneto.github.io/heatindexbr/reference/hi_plot.md)
  : Plot a Heat Index raster
- [`hi_search()`](https://antcneto.github.io/heatindexbr/reference/hi_search.md)
  : Search for municipalities in the Brazilian Semiarid
- [`hi_shape()`](https://antcneto.github.io/heatindexbr/reference/hi_shape.md)
  : Extract Heat Index for a custom spatial area
- [`semiarido_municipios`](https://antcneto.github.io/heatindexbr/reference/semiarido_municipios.md)
  : Brazilian Semiarid municipalities
